title: Phrygilanthus grandiflorus
taxonomy: Phrygilanthus grandiflorus is classified within the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This family is a part of the order Gentianales. Within the Apocynaceae family, Phrygilanthus grandiflorus is typically placed in the subfamily Rauvoloideae. The Rauvoloideae subfamily is further divided into several tribes, but the specific tribe classification of Phrygilanthus grandiflorus is not well-documented. However, it is generally agreed that Phrygilanthus grandiflorus belongs to the plant kingdom and the clade angiosperms.
